headline: Defense-tech stocks are the hot trade as Iran conflict widens
summary: In a week when conflict in Iran sent the U.S. equity market into a tailspin, technology stocks tied to cybersecurity and artificial intelligence have proved more resilient than sectors investors have typically treated as safe havens.

headline: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (CRWD) Price Target Reduced to $500 at Jefferies
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) is among the 10 Stocks That Could Skyrocket in 2026. On February 27, Jefferies analyst Joseph Gallo lowered the firm’s price target on CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) to $500 from $600 while maintaining a Buy rating. Despite the target reduction, which largely reflects broader valuation recalibration across high-multiple software names, the […]

headline: CrowdStrike Falcon arrives on STACKIT amid rising EU cyber regulations
summary: The partnership aims to support European organisations in meeting data residency and cybersecurity compliance requirements on STACKIT.

headline: CrowdStrike Targets European Growth With Sovereign Cloud Push And FalconID Launch
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has entered a long term partnership with Schwarz Digits to deliver its Falcon cybersecurity platform via STACKIT’s GDPR compliant sovereign cloud for European customers. The company also introduced FalconID, an AI powered multifactor authentication tool aimed at improving identity security with a low friction user experience. Both moves target highly regulated European industries and enterprises facing rising AI driven cyber threats and tighter data...
